hypothesis: Per-atom Force Delta, defined as U∆,i = ||Fnc,i(R) − Fc,i(R)|| for atom i, will correlate more strongly with the corresponding per-atom true force error εdirect,i = ||Fnc,i(R) − FDFT,i(R)|| than the global Force Delta, enabling atom-centered uncertainty maps that more accurately forecast local MD instabilities and guide targeted data acquisition.
